metadata.description: matkatmusic/jot — capture ideas with /jot and stack WIP with /plate, without losing focus

plugins.name: jot
plugins.description: Two focus-preserving skills: /jot captures mid-development ideas into Todos/ via a background Claude in tmux; /plate is a stack-of-plates WIP tracker that snapshots uncommitted work when switching tasks and replays the stack as sequential commits with /plate --done.
